response.justification: Strong hands-on full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and a genuine craftsmanship orientation, but the profile is a poor match for a Principal/Director-level IC role in AI strategy. The resume shows roughly 14-16 years of senior/staff-level individual contribution without director-scope influence, no advanced AI/ML degree, no demonstrated AI products or platforms shipped at scale, and minimal cloud-platform strategy work. Recent exposure to MCP and agentic tooling is promising but far too thin to anchor a recognized-AI-expert hire.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infra
Strong software craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based, OSS founder)
Recent hands-on work with MCP and agent infrastructure tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Career trajectory is Senior/Staff IC, not Director-level / Principal influence
Limited cloud-platform strategy depth (AWS CDK usage only, no hyperscaler platform work)

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC bar
